news.title: AI adoption helps Thai firms become digitally mature
news.description: [BANGKOK POST] Thai businesses recorded a medium level of digital maturity for the first time as artificial intelligence (AI) adoption accelerates, according to the Thailand Digital Outlook 2026 survey.

news.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

news.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

news.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Work to automate workplace tasks and files
news.description: [FOX BUSINESS] OpenAI launched ChatGPT Work, an agentic AI tool powered by GPT-5.6 that automates workplace tasks using plugins for Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Drive and SharePoint.
